metadata.description: MCP server for OpenCode, ZeroClaw, VS Code, LM Studio, Ollama+OpenWebUI, and Claude Code

plugins.name: context-mode
plugins.description: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window. Works with OpenCode, ZeroClaw, VS Code, LM Studio, Ollama+OpenWebUI, and Claude Code. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and intent-driven search.
